data.body: UPDATED worktree calib/6982-execute from origin/main: 87304c5e -> 43d15452 (3 commits: Jira link fix + identity signing centralization + enforce_since grace). Clean ff (no local commits). No packaging change (editable install auto-uses new source). Changed files touched _commands/{claim,transition_close,txn,delete,_seam}.py + reconciler + tests — NOT plan_review/review_kernel, so in-flight R6/R7 reviews unaffected. Watch: claim.py/transition_close.py signing changes vs claim/close gates. In-flight reviews carry old verified-at-sha; will re-review to re-sign under new HEAD if claim gate reads attestation stale.
